transcript: Making the Tic Tac Viral Florpina Avocado Dessert. Grab one avocado and cut it into small chunks and then grab some ice and crush it in a blender and add them together. Now for the sweet part, add some sweetened condensed milk right on top and mix it all together and enjoy!

timestamps.text: Making the Tic Tac Viral Florpina Avocado Dessert. Grab one avocado and cut it into small chunks
and then grab some ice and crush it in a blender and add them together. Now for the sweet part,
add some sweetened condensed milk right on top and mix it all together and enjoy!
